_patch_meta.description: VC session vc-134 — FRESH classifications for H2500 (che.leph, preposition) and H4252 (ma.cha.laph, knife/censer). Both terms FRESH under §6.1 posture; all verses set aside under §3 filter (H2500: §3.5 grammatical particle, no_inner_being; H4252: physical_only). All-verses-fail per §6.5.5 for both terms. terms_covered declares scope for vc_status flip on apply.

record.notes: Temple vessel inventory (Ezr 1:9, '29 censers'). Physical object in an accounting list of vessels returned from Babylon; no inner-being engagement. Note: verse renders target as 'censers' against STEP gloss 'knife' — lexical/translation divergence noted for Session B.
